navbar.cannotChangeLanguage: Language can't be changed during the game.

home.subtitle: League of Legends Quiz meets Tic-Tac-Toe.
home.description1: Name champions matching categories to claim squares in a 3x3 grid.
home.description2: Enable Steal Mode to steal your opponent's square.

joinRoom.title: Join existing room
joinRoom.description: Enter room code and join the game

createRoom.title: Create room
createRoom.description: Challenge a friend to an online game

local.title: Same screen game
local.description: Play against a friend on the same device

rules: A 3x3 square grid is lined up with criteria such as legacy, position, resource, range type, and region.
Place your marker, an X or O, in one of the squares if you can name a League of Legends champion that matches the criteria across the top row and left-hand side.
The first to get three in a row, vertically, horizontally or diagonally, is the winner.
With steal mode enabled, each player has 3 steals in total, where a square can be stolen that is occupied by the opposing player.
Infuriate your opponent and steal a square by naming a different champion from the champion already in the position on the grid.

seo.title: League Tac Toe
seo.description: A game of Tic Tac Toe with League of Legends champions. Challenge a friend to an online game or compete against random players from around the world.

home.title: League Tac Toe - League of Legends Quiz meets Tic-Tac-Toe
home.description: Name champions matching categories to claim squares in a 3x3 grid. Enable Steal Mode to steal your opponent's square. Play online or locally with friends.

champions.title: Champions - League Tac Toe
champions.description: Browse and filter all League of Legends champions. Find champions by position, region, resource type, and more.
